articles.description: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.

articles.title: Cooler Saturday gives brief relief before heat returns
articles.description: After a slightly cooler Saturday, temperatures will rise again, possibly touching 35C by Tuesday with a Met Office amber extreme heat warning set to come into force.
